name: eBay Inc.
summary: eBay Inc. is an American multinational e-commerce company that facilitates consumer-to-consumer and business-to-consumer sales. It operates the marketplace website ebay.com, which allows individuals and businesses to buy and sell a wide variety of goods. The company also offers payment solutions through its subsidiary, PayPal, though PayPal was spun off in 2015 and later separated from eBay.
